{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/253543362?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/aisafe-bot", "id": 253543362, "login": "aisafe-bot", "node_id": "U_kgDODxzDwg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45568", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

Alice exposes a Python SDK `ProxyShare` with a fixed target URL. Bob sends a request to the share with an absolute URL in the path. The Flask handler passes that path to `urllib.parse.urljoin`, which replaces Alice's configured target host with Bob's host and returns the server-side response to Bob.

## Details

The Python SDK proxy route accepts every path under the share:

```python
@app.route('/', defaults={'path': ''}, methods=['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH', 'OPTIONS'])
@app.route('/<path:path>', methods=['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH', 'OPTIONS'])
def proxy(path):
```

It constructs the outbound URL with `urljoin` and then sends the request:

```python
url = urllib.parse.urljoin(self.target, path)
resp = requests.request(
    method=request.method,
    url=url,
    headers={key: value for (key, value) in request.headers
             if key.lower() not in HOP_BY_HOP_HEADERS},
    data=request.get_data(),
    cookies=request.cookies,
    allow_redirects=False,
    stream=True,
    verify=self.verify_ssl
)
```

When `path` is `[http://127.0.0.1:19190/metadata`](http://127.0.0.1:19190/metadata%60), `urljoin(self.target, path)` returns `[http://127.0.0.1:19190/metadata`](http://127.0.0.1:19190/metadata%60). The proxy sends the request to Bob's chosen URL rather than Alice's target.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00356, "percentile": 0.27904}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T15:16:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45568"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T15:16:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openziti/zrok/security/advisories/GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openziti/zrok/security-advisories/GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openziti/zrok", "summary": "rok Python ProxyShare can be used as an SSRF proxy through absolute URL paths", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:16:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jh67-hwqw-m5r7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "zrok"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.4.47, <= 1.1.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: rok Python ProxyShare can be used as an SSRF proxy through absolute URL paths
